Sarvam AI has raised $234 million in its Series B — one of India's largest AI funding rounds. The Bengaluru startup builds LLMs in Indian languages, positioning itself as a homegrown alternative to Western AI platforms. #IndiaNews #AI #SarvamAI

Trump says the Strait of Hormuz will be 'completely open' by Friday, following the US-brokered Israel-Iran ceasefire. The waterway carries ~20% of global oil — its reopening is key to stabilising energy prices worldwide. #IndiaNews…
